working_on.notes: Everything is working smoothly, tested SplitScreen via Reflection and AutoStart receiver.

recent_changes.description: Converted Launcher to Standard Overlay App, added AutoStart, SplitScreen fix, Opacity/Scale features, and flat styling.

errors_encountered.error: Visual Glitch polygons on shadow modifier
SplitScreen opens consecutively rather than adjacently on Head Units
errors_encountered.solution: Invoked Method setLaunchWindowingMode (Primary 3 / Secondary 4) manually via Reflection

decisions_made.decision: Use Reflection for ActivityOptions Windowing Modes
decisions_made.reason: FLAG_ACTIVITY_LAUNCH_ADJACENT does not force splitscreen correctly on heavily modified Android automotive OS.
User wanted it to work on top of their main launcher instead of replacing it entirely.
